calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Lieu (Petitioner) in propria persona. Jenny Huynh (Petitioner's Wife) in propria persona. Tom Lieu (Son/Interested Party) was also present.

The Court stated that the matter had been placed on calendar for an appearance by Jenny Huynh, that Ms. Huynh is present in court today, and that everything appears to be in order to grant the petition. The Court then granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.
